title: Payment Gateway Market Opportunity Report 2026: Drivers, Trends, and Forecasts 2025-2035 - Growing Blockchain and Cryptocurrency Integration and Emerging Markets with Underbanked Populations
author: Researchandmarkets.Com
description: The global payment gateway market is projected to grow from USD 32.7 billion in 2025 to USD 116.7 billion by 2035, at a CAGR of 14.1%. Growth is driven by rapid digital payment adoption, e-commerce expansion, mobile penetration, and increasing demand for secure transactions. Hosted payment gateways lead with 52.3% market share, while card-based payments capture 47%. Key opportunities include blockchain integration and emerging markets with underbanked populations.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Listed as a key global player in the payment gateway market with strong competitive positioning. Benefits from the projected 14.1% CAGR market growth and increasing digital payment adoption worldwide.
Key player in the dominant cards segment (47% market share, USD 15.4 billion). Benefits from global card network infrastructure and established consumer confidence in card-based transactions.
Major player in the cards segment with global acceptance and established infrastructure. Positioned to benefit from continued dominance of card-based payments across online and offline channels.
Key market player investing in cloud-based infrastructure and AI technologies to improve processing speed and operational efficiency in payment gateway solutions.
Major player in the payment gateway market with focus on advanced security technologies and cross-border payment capabilities supporting global commerce expansion.
Key competitor investing in API-driven platforms and strategic partnerships to expand service ecosystems and improve scalability across industries.
Key player in the U.S. payment gateway market, which is valued at USD 9.8 billion and expected to grow at 12.4% CAGR through 2035.

title: Only One Week Away. C-Level Technology Leadership and the Rise of Iconic Leaders Will Shape the Conversation at HMG Strategy’s 2026 Dallas Summit. Be a Part of It. Register Now.
author: Not Specified
description: HMG Strategy is hosting its 18th Annual Dallas C-Level Technology Leadership Summit on April 8, 2026, bringing together technology executives to explore leadership excellence, AI disruption, and strategic innovation. The summit will feature sessions on CEO-level leadership, data and AI utilization, security innovation, and industrial digitization, with speakers from major companies including Academy Sports + Outdoors, Rackspace Technology, U.S. Bank, and Box.

title: Got $200? 1 Artificial Intelligence (AI) Stock to Buy and Hold for the Long Term
author: Dave Kovaleski
description: Pagaya Technologies, an AI fintech company that helps banks process loans, is trading down 43% in 2026 at $11.85 per share. The decline stems from a strategic pivot away from higher-risk business segments like single-family rentals toward an asset-light AI infrastructure model. Despite lower near-term guidance, analysts are bullish with a median price target of $30, suggesting 153% upside potential.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Stock is down 43% YTD creating an attractive entry point; company turned profitable with $34M GAAP net income; 100% of 10 analysts rate it as buy with median $30 price target (153% upside); trading at low forward P/E of 10 and PEG ratio of 0.09; strategic pivot toward higher-margin AI infrastructure business positions it for long-term growth despite near-term revenue headwinds.

title: HABITAT LA TO HONOR TINA KNOWLES, U.S. BANK, AND BROOKFIELD RESIDENTIAL AT THE 2026 LOS ANGELES BUILDERS BALL®
author: Na
description: Habitat for Humanity of Greater Los Angeles will hold its 2026 Los Angeles Builders Ball on March 26 at The Fairmont Century Plaza, honoring Tina Knowles, U.S. Bank, and Brookfield Residential for their contributions to affordable housing. Last year's event raised over $1 million, with proceeds supporting Habitat LA's affordable housing initiatives and ReBUILD LA program for wildfire recovery.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: U.S. Bank is being honored as the Foundation Builder Award recipient and is the presenting sponsor of Habitat LA's largest annual fundraiser, demonstrating significant corporate commitment to affordable housing and community development initiatives.

title: Robinhood Soared by 204% in 2025, but Here's Another Financial Stock to Buy in 2026
author: Jennifer Saibil
description: While Robinhood Markets surged 204% in 2025, it has declined 23% over the past three months due to cryptocurrency exposure and high valuation concerns. SoFi Technologies is recommended as a safer alternative financial stock for 2026, offering more reliable growth through diverse revenue streams, record customer additions, and less market volatility exposure.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Despite impressive 2025 gains of 204%, the stock has declined 23% in the past three months. The article cites concerns about high cryptocurrency dependence, elevated valuation, and suggests it may not be the right time to buy.

Recommended as an excellent financial stock to buy in 2026. The company shows robust growth, record customer additions (900,000+ in Q3 2025), improving profitability at scale, diverse revenue streams, and lower susceptibility to market volatility compared to Robinhood.
